calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Jun-22-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Sohila Zadran'S Notice Of Petition And/Or Motion And Petition And/Or Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Proceedings Pursuant To C.C.P. 1281.2 And 1281.4
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARTIN L. HORWITZ, Esq. of Law Office of Martin L. Horwitz, P.C. (Tel: 310-278-3833) for plaintiff Hughes & Llloyd Pte. Limited;
Atty. ANDREW B. ELGIN, Esq. of LTL Attorneys, LLP (Tel: 213-612-8900) for defendant Schila Zadran.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SOHILA ZADRAN's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Proceedings Pursuant To C.C.P. 1281.2 And 1281.4

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Sohila Zadran's unopposed petition to compel arbitration and stay court proceedings is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARTIN L. HORWITZ, Esq. of Law Office of Martin L. Horwitz, P.C. (Tel: 310-278-3833) for plaintiff Hughes & Llloyd Pte. Limited;
Atty. ANDREW B. ELGIN, Esq. of LTL Attorneys, LLP (Tel: 213-612-8900) for defendant Schila Zadran.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GILDED CELLS, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Default.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Gilded Cells, Inc.'s unopposed motion to set aside default is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
